data.title: CRV at critical $0.20 pivot. A close above $0.21 may push to $0.22-$0.23, failure could result in decline.
data.description: The CRV token is currently trading at the pivotal price of $0.20, with key resistance levels set by major moving averages. The momentum of the token is stagnant at the moment. If the token manages to close above $0.21, a potential upward movement towards $0.22-$0.23 could be expected. However, failing to break this resistance level may result in a drop in the token's value.

data.title: FLOKI at $0.00002186, oversold but volume low. Bears still in control. Price may hit $0.0000240-$0.0000260. Binance volume at just $82.
data.description: FLOKI is currently trading at $0.00002186, with stochastic oscillators indicating oversold conditions. This could lead to a potential rebound towards the range of $0.0000240-$0.0000260. However, trading volume on Binance is low, barely exceeding $82.

data.title: TON is at $1.60, as futures traders go long at high funding rate. Next week crucial for validating crowd sentiment.
data.description: The price of TON currently stands at $1.60 and is struggling to rise above several declining moving averages. Futures traders are heavily investing in long positions at a high funding rate. The upcoming week will determine whether this trend in derivatives trading will be proven accurate.

data.title: Oversold signals show SHIB at $0.0000043, but a bounce may occur near $0.0000053 with RSI close to oversold levels.
data.description: The cryptocurrency SHIB is currently trading at $0.0000043, showing a Relative Strength Index (RSI) that is just three points away from being oversold. There is also a quiet formation of a Stochastic crossover. These technical indicators suggest a potential bounce up to $0.0000053. Additionally, the mention of Binance being involved implies a potential impact on the price movement.

data.title: Bearish forecast for WLD as it trades at $0.37, headed towards $0.30. Technicals signal a downward trend.
data.description: The stock WLD is currently being traded at $0.37, significantly below all important moving averages, while the price remains close to the lower Bollinger Band. There are no positive indicators to boost its value. CoinCodex forecasts a potential decrease to $0.2997.

data.title: SUI's current price of $0.73 may seem promising, but it's a fake uptick until $0.77 is surpassed. Bulls need a solid close above $0.77 to confirm trend reversal.
data.description: The recent rise in SUI's price to $0.73 appears promising, but important indicators suggest caution as numerous significant moving averages signal a potential sell-off. Without a strong daily close above $0.77, the current increase may just be short-sellers covering their positions.

data.title: Price of OP expected to rise to $0.11, followed by gradual decline to $0.078. Retail short, smart money buying. 10-15% squeeze anticipated.
data.description: Amidst crowded retail activity and discreet purchases by smart investors near the lower Bollinger Band, an opportunity has emerged for a potential 10–15% tactical increase towards the range of $0.10–$0.11. However, it is crucial not to mistake this rebound for a significant shift in trend.

data.title: Lanas appoints Rob Hutcheson as Chief Corporate Development Officer to accelerate acquisition strategy
data.description: In Dublin on July 2, 2026, Lanas, a healthcare technology company based in Ireland, announced the appointment of Rob Hutcheson as the Chief Corporate Development Officer. This move aims to enhance the company's acquisition abilities as it grows its healthcare technology services.

data.title: Hexaware Recognized Among Top Providers in Whitelane Research UK & Ireland 2026 IT Sourcing Study
data.description: A recent survey conducted independently has revealed that Hexaware Technologies, a leading global IT solutions and services provider listed on NSE as HEXT, has garnered significant client trust in its AI-driven delivery and operational capabilities. The survey, conducted by Whitelane Research in the UK, highlighted Hexaware's impressive performance.

data.title: BT and Ivanti launch telco-first remote eSIM installation for managed Android devices
data.description: In Salt Lake City on July 2, 2026, BT Business and Ivanti announced a groundbreaking partnership to introduce a cutting-edge solution for businesses to implement mobile connectivity for managed Android devices on a large scale. This innovative capability, a first in the telco industry, empowers organizations to seamlessly activate eSIMs directly for their devices.

data.title: einwert Becomes Part of Newmark's Valuation & Advisory Business in Germany
data.description: Newmark expands valuation capabilities throughout Europe, aiming to enhance services for its wide client base. The initiative, launched on July 2, 2026, involves Newmark Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: NMRK), a key player in commercial real estate consulting for major institutional investors worldwide. The Company's proactive steps in Munich indicate a strategic move towards strengthening its presence in the European market. This development underscores Newmark's commitment to leveraging its expertise and resources to serve its customers more effectively within the global real estate landscape.
